name: dograh-voicelink-plugin
description: VoiceLink ↔ Dograh telephony integration plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: dograh-voicelink-plugin
plugins.description: Zero-to-hero VoiceLink telephony provider for Dograh. Bundles the real provider package, applies the three surgical wiring edits, supports both source-checkout and Docker-overlay installs, configures the single inbound+outbound WSS URL and the Settings → Telephony card, and verifies end-to-end with built-in debugging.
